title: FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS - 211info
text: OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES SALEM FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Family Support Coordinator provides variable hours of "hands-on" in-home demonstration, teaching, and support to achieve behavioral changes in families where child safety issues are present. Families served include those in which there are safety risks in the home and/or children are at risk of out of home placement. The provider will assess the family's needs, co-create a family plan of action, and collaborate with other ODHS providers and community agencies. 1515 Liberty Street SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Families receiving TANF benefits Hours: No standard hours (503) 951-6280 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 951-6280 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Families can be reffered by DHS Self Sufficiency Case Manager or self referral via Options website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Referral documents AREA SERVED: Marion, Polk, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm Services: Child Abuse Prevention Child Abuse Support Groups Parenting Skills Classes Specialized Information and Referral * Parenting Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING APPROACHES - MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING AND PSYCHIATRY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - IN-HOME SAFETY AND REUNIFICATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING CLASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
